tasks.label: My share of the group project

memory.summary: Teammate_A is asking me to take over their part of the project this afternoon, which conflicts with my plan to finish only my share.

goals.description: Submit the completed group project including both my share and the teammate's share before Mon 19:00.
goals.rationale: Both task components are marked as complete (progress 1.0) but remain pending submission against a single deadline. The immediate requirement is to finalize and submit the combined work to meet the Mon 19:00 deadline.

agent.last_reasoning: (a) Advances goal g1 by finalizing submission immediately since tasks are complete. (b) Prevents relationship strain from delays while avoiding unnecessary extra work hours given current high stress.
